events.name: UConn Huskies at Michigan Wolverines

notes.headline: NCAA Men's Basketball Championship - National Championship

highlights.headline: Michigan holds off UConn rally for first title in 37 years
highlights.description: Michigan secures its first NCAA men's basketball title since 1989.

West Virginia Mountaineers at Creighton Bluejays

headlines.description: — DJ Thomas helped lead West Virginia over Creighton on Saturday with 20 points off of the bench in an 87-70 victory in the College Basketball Crown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thomas scores 20 as West Virginia downs Creighton 87-70 in CBC

headlines.description: — David Green had 13 points in Tulsa's 74-69 win over New Mexico on Thursday night in the NIT semifinals.

events.name: Oklahoma Sooners at Colorado Buffaloes

headlines.description: — Nijel Pack scored six of his 20 points in overtime and Oklahoma defeated Colorado 90-86 on Wednesday night in the College Basketball Crown quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pack and Oklahoma secure 90-86 overtime win over Colorado in College Basketball Crown quarterfinals

events.name: Baylor Bears at Minnesota Golden Gophers

headlines.description: — Tounde Yessoufou had 19 points in Baylor's 67-48 victory over Minnesota on Wednesday night in the College Basketball Crown quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yessoufou scores 19 as Baylor beats Minnesota 67-48 in College Basketball Crown quarterfinals

events.name: Tennessee Volunteers at Michigan Wolverines

notes.headline: NCAA Men's Basketball Championship - Midwest Region - Elite 8

highlights.headline: Yaxel Lendeborg gets sweet and-1 to fall for Michigan
highlights.description: Yaxel Lendeborg drives and gets a smooth reverse and-1 layup to fall for Michigan vs. Tennessee.

headlines.description: — It was Yaxel Lendeborg, Elliot Cadeau and Aday Mara. Morez Johnson Jr., Trey McKenney and Nimari Burnett, too. The list goes on and on.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yaxel Lendeborg and deep, unselfish Michigan roll into the Final Four, beating Tennessee 95-62
